channel.title: Murmur
channel.description: Updates for Murmur, private on-device speech-to-text for macOS.

item.title: Version 0.6.0
item.description:
• Fixed a freeze that could make Murmur stop responding when the audio system was slow or busy while starting or stopping a recording.
  • Meetings no longer lower your system volume while recording, so live calls (like Google Meet) stay easy to hear.
  • Meetings now show a "Starting…" indicator immediately instead of a short delay before recording begins.
  • Murmur now tells you when a meeting captured only your microphone and not the other side.
